studio.name: KCDanceHQ
studio.description: Six KCDanceHQ homepage directions prepared for review.
studio.heading: KCDanceHQ, modernised.
studio.intro: Six directions for comparing KCDanceHQ website options. Demo 3 to Demo 6 now explore distinct venue, community, age-stage and teacher-culture structures while keeping the friendly recreational studio promise clear. Open each option in a new tab to compare the structure, visual rhythm and enrolment path.

templates.label: Demo 1
templates.title: Premium Minimalist
templates.description: A refined, whitespace-led modernisation on a neutral cream canvas, with your brand pink used as a deliberate accent. Built to feel calm, premium and trustworthy for parents researching seriously.

templates.label: Demo 2
templates.title: Warm Contemporary
templates.description: Keeps the warmth and energy of your current site, refreshed with a full-bleed photographic hero, contemporary card and grid patterns, modern motion and tighter typography. Emotive, but polished.

templates.label: Demo 3
templates.title: New Home Showcase
templates.description: A venue-led direction that opens with the Bennetts Green facade and uses the new facility, studio video, real room imagery and Lycra pattern as the main proof points.
templates.source: Codex regenerated demo, 2026-05-28, venue-led KCDanceHQ redesign

templates.label: Demo 4
templates.title: Friendly Recreational Studio
templates.description: A community-first direction built around quality dance tuition without competition pressure, with the venue, teachers and warm studio culture leading the journey.
templates.source: Codex regenerated demo, 2026-05-28, recreational community KCDanceHQ redesign

templates.label: Demo 5
templates.title: Every Age And Stage
templates.description: A pathway-led direction that presents KCDanceHQ as the main school for preschool, kids, teens and adults, with KCCubs clearly separated as the preschool programme.
templates.previewAlt: Demo 5 Every Age And Stage preview
templates.source: Codex regenerated demo, 2026-05-28, age and stage KCDanceHQ redesign

templates.label: Demo 6
templates.title: Professional Teachers Joyful Culture
templates.description: A trust-led direction that balances professional teachers, joyful culture and the low-pressure recreational promise, with performance proof kept as supporting context.
templates.previewAlt: Demo 6 Professional Teachers Joyful Culture preview
templates.source: Codex regenerated demo, 2026-05-28, teacher and culture KCDanceHQ redesign
